benefits.description: More energetic behavior, no fatigue after 10,000 steps. Energy levels remained above baseline after cycle.
Remaining depression disappeared. Optimistic outlook on life. Life became more enjoyable.
Sleep problems disappeared; slept 12 hours. Sleep normalized and became circadian-rhythm dependent. Sleep improved and never returned to prior bad levels even after partial regression at ~1 month.
Creativity increased 3-4x, desire to learn increased, restored productivity as a painter spending 95% of time creating.

protocol_notes: Second participant reported by OP (Jesaul). 64-year-old individual. Sleep normalization lasted about 1 month before partial regression, but did not return to prior baseline.
